title: Compute and persist generalization-gap and stability metrics
description:
## Summary
Compute comparison metrics that quantify whether a score is generalizing beyond curated cases.

## Deliverables
- Compute the benchmark-versus-random generalization gap.
- Compute stability/variance signals across random runs.
- Define how these signals are stored and surfaced in workflow results.

## Notes
These metrics should be interpretable by operators, not just raw math outputs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation: compute and persist generalization-gap and stability metrics from staged random runs and reference comparison, and surface them in compact summary payload for downstream UI/workflow use.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented generalization-gap + stability metrics in shared workflow path: added compute_generalization_metrics() and wired into run_candidate_assessment_workflow() and bundle persistence surfaces. Bundle now carries generalization_metrics and compact summary includes baseline/candidate gaps, gap delta, and random-delta mean/stddev. Added unit tests for multi-random and single-random cases. Validation: pytest -q plexus/cli/shared/candidate_assessment_bundle_test.py plexus/cli/shared/candidate_assessment_runner_test.py plexus/cli/shared/workflow_decision_synthesis_test.py plexus/cli/shared/generalization_metrics_test.py plexus/cli/shared/evaluation_value_function_test.py plexus/cli/shared/optimization_acceptance_policy_test.py (21 passed).
